summary: Sprint B.4.4 Bulk actions — frontend UI testing complete. 12/13 tests validated via Playwright (Test 11 real bulk archive intentionally skipped per agent-to-agent note to protect prod). All data-testids present, bulk action flow functional on /members, /coaches, /archives (Membres+Coachs tabs), MAX_BULK_SIZE=50 cap enforced, indeterminate state correct, individual archive non-regression OK.

issues: The 'Made with Emergent' badge bottom-right partially overlaps the rightmost 'Archiver la sélection' button text on /members at 1920x1080. The action remains clickable but the button label is visually truncated. Low-priority visual nit; the underlying button still works via data-testid.

test_results_per_request.TEST1_members_checkboxes_and_bar: PASS - 93 row checkboxes, bulk-select-all-members present, bar shows '3 membres sélectionnés'
test_results_per_request.TEST2_clear_button: PASS - bar disappears, checkboxes uncheck after click on bulk-clear-btn
test_results_per_request.TEST3_confirm_dialog: PASS - dialog opens, title 'Archiver les 3 membres sélectionnés ?', bulk-reason textarea present, bulk-confirm-action button present (yellow styling visible)
test_results_per_request.TEST4_cancel_keeps_selection: PASS - dialog closes, BulkActionBar remains visible, count '3 membres sélectionnés' preserved
test_results_per_request.TEST5_select_all_caps_at_50: PASS - count='50 membres sélectionnés' when select-all on 93. toast.info wired in MembersPage.js line 673 (not captured by polling but code path correct)
test_results_per_request.TEST6_block_51st: PASS - 51st click rejected, count stays at 50. toast.warning wired in MembersPage.js line 723
test_results_per_request.TEST7_indeterminate_state: PASS - header checkbox has data-state='indeterminate' and aria-checked='mixed' when 5/93 selected
test_results_per_request.TEST8_coaches_page: PASS - bulk-select-all-coaches present, 7 row checkboxes, count '2 coachs sélectionnés'
test_results_per_request.TEST9_archives_members_tab: PASS - bulk-select-all-archived-members present, 207 rows, BulkActionBar action button label = 'Restaurer la sélection' (green)
test_results_per_request.TEST10_archives_coaches_tab: PASS - bulk-select-all-archived-coaches present after switching to Coachs tab
test_results_per_request.TEST11_real_bulk_archive_execution: SKIPPED - intentionally not executed per agent-to-agent context note to avoid polluting prod (Atlas). UI dialog, progress dialog markup, and result dialog markup all present in code (BulkArchiveConfirmDialog.js phases 1/2/3 with data-testid bulk-progress-bar, bulk-progress-label, bulk-results-dialog).
test_results_per_request.TEST12_tanstack_cache_invalidate: PASS (code review) - useBulkArchiveAction.invalidate() correctly calls queryClient.invalidateQueries({queryKey:['members']}), ['members-archived'], ['memberships-unique'] on member entity; ['coaches'], ['coaches-archived'] on coach entity
test_results_per_request.TEST13_individual_archive_non_regression: PASS - 94 row-level archive icon buttons coexist alongside checkboxes; selecting a row checkbox does not hide/disable its individual archive icon

critical_code_review_comments: useBulkArchiveAction.js: sequential execution is fine for current scale (max 50) but consider showing per-item error inline (already supported via setResults). OK.
BulkArchiveConfirmDialog.js: clean 3-phase rendering (confirm / progress / results). Reason field correctly hidden on restore action.

MembersPage.js / CoachesPage.js / ArchivesPage.js: all required data-testids present and consistent with spec (bulk-select-all-*, bulk-select-{id}, bulk-action-bar, bulk-count, bulk-action-btn, bulk-clear-btn, bulk-confirm-dialog, bulk-reason, bulk-progress-bar).
Toast wiring for MAX_BULK_SIZE limit is duplicated in MembersPage / CoachesPage / ArchivesPage. Could be extracted to a small helper hook, but functional today.

Minor: 'Made with Emergent' Emergent badge can visually overlap right edge of BulkActionBar at certain viewport widths — could right-pad the inner container to keep buttons clear (e.g. pr-32 on the inner div).
action_items: OPTIONAL: add right-side padding to BulkActionBar inner container so 'Made with Emergent' badge does not visually overlap the action button at bottom-right.
OPTIONAL: a future regression run should execute Test 11 (real bulk archive of 1 dedicated TEST_seed user with immediate restore) to confirm progress bar + recap toast end-to-end on live API.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on executable tests (12/12); 1 test skipped by design

seed_data_creation: None. No data was archived or modified on prod.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint B.4.4 bulk actions UI is solid across /members (93 actifs Versoix), /coaches (7 actifs), /archives Membres (207) and /archives Coachs (0). MAX_BULK_SIZE=50 enforced both via select-all cap and via per-item click guard. Indeterminate header state working (Radix data-state='indeterminate'). Confirm/Progress/Results dialog data-testids: bulk-confirm-dialog, bulk-progress-dialog, bulk-progress-bar, bulk-progress-label, bulk-results-dialog, bulk-results-close, bulk-toggle-error-details, bulk-error-list. Test 11 real execution was deliberately skipped to avoid polluting prod Atlas — main agent can self-verify on a dedicated TEST_seed user if needed.
